name: centipede_near_death_priority_boost
description: Boost replay priority on near-death transitions to correct catastrophic divergence in survival-critical moments.
llm_notes: Centipede has alignment_rate=0.0003, high_conf_disagree_rate=0.9997, and disagree_near_terminal_rate=1.0 with mean_entropy=2.0995 across 13,863 steps, so survival-critical disagreement should be heavily oversampled.

name: defender_imitation_phase_extend_10000
description: Extend imitation-only warmup to stabilize policy priors before RL takeover in an extreme low-alignment regime.
llm_notes: Defender shows alignment_rate=0.0434 with mean_entropy=2.0306 and high_conf_disagree_rate=0.9566, while reward_on_agree=16.8449 greatly exceeds reward_on_disagree=1.1278, indicating human behavior is valuable but underlearned.

name: montezuma_imitation_phase_extend_10000
description: Increase Montezuma imitation-only warmup further to address persistent high-entropy uncertainty and stagnant eval progression.
llm_notes: Montezuma still has mean_entropy=2.3881 with disagree_near_terminal_rate=0.7436 and eval episodes stuck at max_room=1 with total_reward=0.0, so 7000 imitation steps appear insufficient for stable behavior grounding.
